_comment: CORE — default parameters. Each entry carries the canonical value plus metadata (description, choices or min/max). Edit 'value' fields only; everything else is documentation.

NETWORK.description: Target network (relevant for AAVE multi-chain deployments)

MORPHO_MARKET.description: Morpho market to analyse (only when PROTOCOL=MORPHO)

LOAN_TOKEN.description: Loan token used to filter borrower positions; ALL = no filter

TIME_INTERVAL.description: Price-history frequency fetched from Yahoo Finance

TRAIN_SIZE.description: Rolling GARCH training window in days; longer windows increase stability but reduce responsiveness

N_MC.description: Number of Monte Carlo price scenarios; more paths reduce sampling noise but increase runtime

PERC.description: Confidence level used for VaR/ES diagnostic quantiles (e.g. 0.975 = 97.5%)

SEED.description: Global random seed for full reproducibility; 0 = deterministic baseline

COPULA_TYPE.description: Cross-asset dependence structure; T-COPULA captures heavier joint tails than GAUSSIAN

USE_LOG_RETURNS.description: Use log returns instead of simple returns; recommended for daily frequency

JUMPS.description: Add a compound Poisson jump component on top of GARCH diffusion; improves tail fit

FOCUS_ON_NEGATIVE.description: Restrict jump simulation to downside shocks only (more conservative); only applies when JUMPS=true

HOURLY_CONV.description: Decompose daily returns to hourly resolution via Brownian bridge; increases precision for sub-day liquidation triggers

WORST_CASE.description: Replace observed borrower LTVs with the market's worst-case (liquidation-threshold) LTVs

VOL_FLOOR_PCT.description: GARCH conditional vol forecast is floored at this percentile of the full-history 21-day rolling realised vol; prevents capital requirements collapsing in low-vol regimes

GAS_FEE_USD.description: Liquidation gas cost in USD; deducted from liquidator profit to determine viability

SWAP_FEE_USD.description: DEX swap fee as a decimal (e.g. 0.005 = 0.5%); applied to the collateral leg of each liquidation

MC_TRIGGER.description: Margin-call trigger: fires when LTV >= LiquidationThreshold minus this value (SYRUP/ANCHORAGE only); e.g. 0.05 = 5 pp below LT

MC_TARGET_LTV.description: LTV the borrower restores to after a successful margin call; null = restore to each borrower's initial LTV (SYRUP/ANCHORAGE only)

MC_CURE_PROB.description: Probability that a margin-called borrower actually posts additional collateral (0 = never cures, 1 = always cures)

LIQ_ANALYSIS.description: Run full liquidation simulation; set NO to generate price paths only
